no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-d99a1dd1 ACs are already satisfied at base-rev acdb4627 by prior
merged commit 12d0b618 ("feat(web): re-queue button on try/run rows +
start-worker on work rows [ddx-d99a1dd1]") and supporting GraphQL commit
d9491735 ("feat(graphql): add runRequeue mutation with idempotent atomic
claims"), both reachable from main via merge d1797559.

Evidence in cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/+page.svelte:

  AC1 — Re-queue button visible on try and run rows:
    Lines 398-425: Actions cell renders "Start worker" only when
    layer === 'work'; the {:else} branch renders "Re-queue" with
    data-run-action="requeue" for try and run rows.

  AC2 — Modal prefilled with original config; idempotency key generated
        client-side:
    Lines 30-35: newIdempotencyKey() uses crypto.randomUUID() in-browser.
    Lines 37-45: openRequeueDialog() prefills run id, layer override
    (= run.layer), and a freshly generated idempotency key.
    Lines 503-551: Modal fields render readonly run id, layer override
    select, and editable+regeneratable idempotency key input.
    Lines 74-91: confirmAction() sends RUN_REQUEUE_MUTATION with the
    client-generated key.

  AC3 — work-layer "Start worker" action prefilled with original drain
        config:
    Lines 47-68: openStartWorkerDialog() pretty-prints run.queueInputs
    JSON (the original drain's queue inputs) into actionWorkerArgs.
    Lines 399-411: layer === 'work' rows render the
    data-run-action="start-worker" button.
    Lines 552-577: Modal renders source run id and prefilled
    JSON-editable Worker args textarea.
    Lines 92-114: confirmAction() validates JSON and dispatches via
    WORKER_DISPATCH_MUTATION with kind="execute-loop".

queueInputs is fetched in PROJECT_RUNS_QUERY in +page.ts (added by
commit 12d0b618).

The REVIEW:BLOCK note on this bead references a subsequent attempt
(20260503T061237-...) whose isolated diff contained only evidence —
not the cumulative state of the codebase. The feature ships at HEAD.

verification_command: grep -q "openRequeueDialog\|openStartWorkerDialog\|RUN_REQUEUE_MUTATION\|WORKER_DISPATCH_MUTATION" cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/projects/\[projectId\]/runs/+page.svelte && grep -q "data-run-action=\"requeue\"" cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/projects/\[projectId\]/runs/+page.svelte && grep -q "data-run-action=\"start-worker\"" cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/projects/\[projectId\]/runs/+page.svelte
